title: Romantic Pillowy Slovakian Sugar Pastry
description: A deliciously bitter Slovakinian dessert featuring a deep-fried sugar pastry, perfect for romantic evenings.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, granulated sugar, and bitter almonds.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or a glass.
Heat the oil in the deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Fry the dough circles in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Drain the fried pastry on paper towels and dust with powdered sugar and confectioners' sugar.
Serve warm and drizzle with heavy cream.
